aboutBody:
IRHS Associates — Ressource Humaine Solutions — is a New Delhi-based leadership and behavioural training and management consulting firm founded in 2016.

With over 30 years of corporate experience, I bring deep practical insight to every engagement. Our work spans leadership development, behavioural change, and organisational effectiveness — helping teams and leaders perform at their best.

I have conducted programmes for organisations across sectors, working closely with leadership teams to create lasting impact.
